opening_line: I saw my uncle on the second floor. He's visiting me on four. He's in two places. That's not possible.
notes_for_player: Same clothing on CAM 02 and CAM 04 — verify both feeds.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: He's on two. He's also on four. Uncle Volodymyr doesn't have a twin.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Grey jacket. Same bald spot. Same walk. Exactly the same.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Switch the cameras. You'll see. I'm not crazy. I'm tired of being scared.
